subcodes.first_line: O thou upon whom the glances of God have been directed! He beholdeth thee at all times. Beware lest thou commit that which He abhorreth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا نظر قد ارتدت الیک لحظات الله و ینظرک فی کل حین ایاک ان تعمل ما یکرهه
subcodes.subjects: @contention and conflict, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @being a source of light; guidance, @spiritual transformation, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
